subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! That renowned letter which thou hadst written to his honour Minshádí was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نامی که بحضرت منشادی نگاشته بودی ملاحظه گردید چون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha
